ValidationRule.description: Non BEAT admins are only able to edit the Request Status field in the Admin Only section
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT(ISNEW()), NOT( $Permission.BEAT_Admin), ISCHANGED(Approval_Date__c), ISCHANGED(Payment_Status__c), ISCHANGED(Payment_Method__c), ISCHANGED(Applied_Discount__c), ISCHANGED(Transaction_Code__c), ISCHANGED(Payment_Reference__c), ISCHANGED(Payment_Date__c), ISCHANGED(Admin_Comments__c), ISCHANGED(Shipping_Cost__c), ISCHANGED(Seat_Approved__c), ISCHANGED(Event__c), ISCHANGED(ND_Ticket_Type__c), ISCHANGED(Seat_Lot_Requested__c), ISCHANGED(Section__c), ISCHANGED(Requestor_Comments__c), ISCHANGED(Responsible_Payer__c), ISCHANGED(Credit_Card_Status__c), ISCHANGED(Requested_By__c), ISCHANGED(Sit_With__c), ISCHANGED(Swap__c), ISCHANGED(Pre_Season_Pass__c), ISCHANGED(Seat_Location__c) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Please contact Jill Calderone or Andrew Frye to make changes to the Ticket Request.
